synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-1832 Oracle Linux 10 apr-util bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1832
description:
[1.6.3-23]
- Resolves: RHEL-117419 - apr-util lmdb prevent htdbm to remove user
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1832

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1832.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
apr-util-1.6.3-23.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
apr-util-devel-1.6.3-23.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

apr-util-odbc-1.6.3-23.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

apr-util-pgsql-1.6.3-23.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
apr-util-sqlite-1.6.3-23.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:

apr-util-mysql-1.6.3-23.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
apr-util-odbc-1.6.3-23.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
apr-util-openssl-1.6.3-23.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
apr-util-pgsql-1.6.3-23.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
apr-util-sqlite-1.6.3-23.el10_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:

Description of changes:

[1.6.3-23]
- Resolves: RHEL-117419 - apr-util lmdb prevent htdbm to remove user
